LightningComponentBundle.masterLabel: (DM) Diff Matrix Read Only Field Paginator

propertyType.name: T
propertyType.label: SObject Type
propertyType.description: Generic sObject data type used for input sObject properties

property.name: sobjectType
property.label: the API name of the object inputted in the type above
property.description: TODO - create a LWC for the input of the variables here so we can get the inputed type back in the JS to run a describe on it without the user inputting it twice

property.name: fields
property.label: Fields to display
property.description: json string of [{title: title1, feilds : [field1, field2]}, {title: title2, feilds : [field3, field4]}]

property.name: recordNames
property.label: List of Record Labels
property.description: ordered in the order of the columns in the table

property.name: totalRecordId
property.label: Record Id of the total record

property.name: orientation
property.label: Field Record Orientation
property.description: true is fields across the top, false is fields down the sides
